name: DefiLlama API
description: Free, open API for DeFi protocol data. No API key required.

protocols.description: List all DeFi protocols with TVL data

protocol_detail.description: Detailed TVL history for a specific protocol

chains.description: TVL for all chains. Find Sui's total TVL here.

chain_tvl_history.description: Historical TVL data for Sui specifically

yields_pools.description: All yield farming pools across chains. Filter for chain='Sui'

stablecoins.description: All stablecoins with market caps. Filter for chains including Sui.

usage_notes: All endpoints are GET requests, no authentication needed
Rate limit: ~300 requests per 5 minutes (be reasonable)
Use /v2/ endpoints for the latest data format
